RuleSet.Name: schema/dbcreate/db2luw/crsp_read_dbtablename_cc.sql
RuleSet.GenFile: -- -- @(#) $GenPackageDir$/$GenFileName$ $MssDoubleDashScriptLicense$ create or replace procedure $sp_read_dbtablename_cc$($implDb2LUWSPStandardArgs$$reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each sparg_CommaTableCol )$ ) \\ dynamic result sets 1 \\ language sql \\ begin$implDb2LUWSPReadCCDeclarations$ \\ begin$switch TableName Cluster empty Tenant empty SecUser empty SecSession empty default implDb2LUWSPReadEnforceSec$$implDb2LUWSPReadTableImplBody$ \\ end; \\ end
RuleSet.GenRule: \\ declare permissionFlag integer; \\ declare isSystemUser integer; \\ declare syscurs cursor with return to client for \\ select distinct( $lower reference BaseClass ClassCode$.ClassCode ) as ClassCode \\ from $lower DbSchemaName$.$DbTableName$ as $lower ClassCode$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes implDb2LUWClassCodeJoinSuperTable default empty$ \\ where \\ $reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( first implDb2LUWIndexColumnWhereFragBindVar each implDb2LUWIndexColumnWhereAndFragBindVar )$ \\ order by ClassCode asc; \\ declare usercurs cursor with return to client for \\ select distinct( $lower reference BaseClass ClassCode$.ClassCode ) as ClassCode \\ from $lower DbSchemaName$.$DbTableName$ as $lower ClassCode$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes implDb2LUWClassCodeJoinSuperTable default empty$ \\ where \\ $reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( first implDb2LUWIndexColumnWhereFragBindVar each implDb2LUWIndexColumnWhereAndFragBindVar )$$implDb2LUWReadRestrictSec$ \\ order by ClassCode asc;
